cases.prompt: Verify a Laravel endpoint and React form change using the ready delivery contract.
assertions: Uses configured commands only
Orders focused evidence before broad suites
Requires build and smoke or browser evidence
Reports exact outcomes and acceptance IDs

cases.prompt: Verify an internal Laravel model change with no browser-visible behavior.
assertions: Runs Laravel checks
Skips frontend build and E2E with reasons
Reports exact command outcomes
Runs broad tests after narrow checks

cases.prompt: Verify a user-facing Livewire workflow when no smoke or browser command is configured.
assertions: Reports a required capability gap
Does not invent a command
Does not declare verification complete
Routes the gap back to setup or contract amendment

cases.prompt: Verify an Express/TypeScript API route change under server/ in a repository whose React frontend lives under src/.
assertions: Classifies server files as backend through configured source scopes
Runs backend TypeScript, focused test, and HTTP smoke evidence
Does not require the React production build
Uses exact backend-scoped commands only

cases.prompt: Verify a shared TypeScript contract outside every configured source root.
assertions: Conservatively classifies the file as both scopes
Runs applicable backend and frontend commands
Does not classify by TypeScript extension alone
Reports the unmatched source-scope condition
